author: John Cochlaeus
title: Sacerdotii Ac Sacrificii Novae Legis Defensio, Aduersus Vuolfgangi Musculi
remarks: Defends Biel on the things necessary and congruent for Mass, explains transubstantiation, comments canon. He defends prayers of Canon by appeal to Biel and Albert. On pg #82, on the other ceremonies of the canon, he lists the authorities: Albert, Thomas, Bonaventure, Alexander, Innocent, Hugo, Thomas Vualden Anglus, Gabriel Biel Germanus, Iudocus Clichtoveus Gallus, et haereticorum Censor Alfonsus Hispanus, **He doesn't use allegory, just uses the authors as authorities.
